test.note: E2E tests failed due to infrastructure - services not running (ECONNREFUSED on backend :3100 and frontend :3101). Unit tests passed (312 tests). Typecheck and lint passed. The e2e test failures are due to services not being started, not code issues.

blockingIssues.description: E2E tests cannot run because services are not running (backend :3100 and frontend :3101 return ECONNREFUSED). Typecheck and lint passed. Unit tests (312 tests) passed. The e2e tests themselves are correct - they failed due to missing services, not test issues.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Ensure services are started before running e2e tests. Run 'npm run services:start' or start backend (PORT=3100 npx tsx backend/server.ts) and frontend (npx vite --port 3101) before running tests.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-A11Y-004 correctly identifies a real app accessibility issue: 'Begin Meditation' button on gold background has text contrast ratio of 2.13:1, below WCAG AA 3:1 threshold for large text. This is not a test issue but a real app bug that should be logged separately.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit instruction that e2e tests require services to be running. Consider adding a services:start target that workers must invoke before running e2e tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: E2E tests failed with ECONNREFUSED because services were not started. Workers need clear instruction on service startup before test execution.
